rulings.Case Title: BIANA CHERNOGUZ ET AL VS. LEANA PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 21, 2020 line . DEFENDANT LEANA PEREZ, FRANCISCO ARMAS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment is DENIED, triable issues of fact exist as to nuisance created by Defendant, if any. Plaintiff to prepare order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LIEU LUONG ET AL VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 21, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained for Plaintiff to allege a sole cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress asserting facts, not conclusions, regarding severe emotional distress caused by Defendant. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. =(501/CFH)
